name: Survival Analysis
description: Computes the survival analysis curves and allows you to compare them visually

parameters.name: Events data
parameters.description: The file that contains events, duration, strata

parameters.name: Model
parameters.description: The model to use, whether kaplan-meier or fleming-harrington

parameters.name: Censored Event Field Name
parameters.description: The field name in the input file that contains the Censored Events

parameters.name: Duration Field Name
parameters.description: The field name in the input file that contains the Duration

parameters.name: Field name to iterate on
parameters.description:
The name of the field in the dataset to be used to split the data and perform the analysis for each of the unique values.
(or "null" if you don't need to split and want to analyse the whole dataset at once)

parameters.name: Strata Field Name
parameters.description: The field name in the input file that contains the Strata (leave it empty if you don't need it)
